abstract: MistTrack OpenAPI Toolkit—an AI-powered agent toolkit driven by the MistTrack Anti-Money Laundering (AML) tracking system. It supports cryptocurrency address risk scoring (AML/KYT/KYA), address tag lookup, address overviews, address profiling, transaction investigation, behavioral analysis, and counterparty analysis. The toolkit also includes multi-signature (multisig) address identification and permission analysis—detecting Gnosis Safe wallets on ETH/EVM chains, TRON native permission multisig, and Bitcoin P2SH/P2WSH/P2TR address formats. The toolkit supports over 200 tokens across more than 20 blockchains, including BTC, ETH, TRX, BNB, and SOL.

environment_variables.name: MISTTRACK_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: MistTrack API key for authenticating all API requests (recommended). All scripts prioritize this variable. If absent, x402 pay-per-use via X402_PRIVATE_KEY is the only alternative. Obtain at https://dashboard.misttrack.io/apikeys

environment_variables.name: X402_PRIVATE_KEY
environment_variables.description: Hex-encoded EVM/Solana private key for x402 pay-per-use payments. SECURITY WARNING: This key can sign and broadcast on-chain USDC transactions. A hard cap of $1.00 USDC per call is enforced in code, but supplying any private key to an agent grants it the ability to transfer value autonomously. Prefer passing the key via --private-key at invocation time rather than storing it permanently as an environment variable. Do not set this variable unless you understand and accept the risk.

security_notes: The core AML scripts (risk_check, address_investigation, transfer_security_check, multisig_analysis, batch_risk_check) are read-only and make only GET/POST requests to openapi.misttrack.io. The x402 payment script (pay.py) can sign and broadcast on-chain USDC transactions when X402_PRIVATE_KEY is set. The --auto flag bypasses per-call confirmation. To limit autonomous payment risk: (1) do not set X402_PRIVATE_KEY as a long-lived environment variable, (2) disable autonomous model calls for the payment sub-skill, (3) rely on MISTTRACK_API_KEY for normal usage.
